Module 4:
Creating Prelaunch Content,
Part 1
!
Executive Summary
!
You’re now going to learn about all the different types of prelaunch content,
and the tools used to create them.
The phrase “horses for courses”, is used to explain that different types of
horses are better for different courses. Similarly, different types of PLC are
right for different situations.
If you see someone doing something, you don’t have to do it that way, e.g.
if I’m doing video you don’t have to do video. It all depends on your
situation and your assets.
Additionally, you should never feel worried about presenting some of your
personality within your marketing. Nowadays a lot more people realize that,
and we see even the largest companies trying to appear a lot more human.
One of the advantages we have over large companies is that we're very
human and that people can really build a connection with us. You want to
be warm and personable - you want to have a personality.
I would encourage you to consider using video even if you're not terribly
comfortable - your personality shines through and people can easily tell
you're a human.
Remember it's all about progress not perfection - you will get better at it
over time.
!

Types of Prelaunch Content
• 	Screencap video
• 	“Full motion” or “live” video
• 	Audio
• 	PDF Report
• 	Webinars and teleseminars
• 	Software
In the next lesson we'll start going through all these different types starting
with screen capture video and full motion video
!
